summary: Iteration 24: Contact Request & Connection-Based Chat Model - MAJOR BUSINESS MODEL CHANGE. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working correctly for premium client (connected state), free client (blocked state), provider dashboard (contact requests tab), and client dashboard (sent requests section).

issues: Google Maps RefererNotAllowedMapError - API key domain restriction (known issue, not code bug)

backend_api_tests: POST /api/contact-requests - free client blocked (403 with 'suscripcion Premium' message)
GET /api/contact-requests/sent - premium client can view sent requests
GET /api/contact-requests/received - carer can view received requests
POST /api/chat/messages - blocked for unconnected users (403 with 'conexion' message)
GET /api/chat/conversations - returns only conversations with connected users
GET /api/care-requests - subscribed carer can view full list
GET /api/providers/{id} - hides contact when not connected
GET /api/providers/{id} - free client shows no subscription
frontend_ui_tests: Premium client provider profile - shows 'Conectados' status with green checkmark
Premium client provider profile - 'Ir al Chat' button visible for connected users
Premium client provider profile - full contact info visible (address, phone, WhatsApp)
Free client provider profile - shows lock icon with 'suscripcion Premium' message
Free client provider profile - subscription card with '$9.990/mes' price visible
Free client provider profile - contact info hidden (phone, WhatsApp not visible)
Provider dashboard - 'Solicitudes Directas' tab visible and active
Provider dashboard - contact requests section shows client info and messages
Provider dashboard - accepted requests show 'Aceptada - Chat desbloqueado' with chat link
Client dashboard - 'Solicitudes de Contacto Enviadas' section visible for premium clients
Client dashboard - sent requests show provider name, message, and 'Chat Activo' status

seed_data_creation: Existing connection between cliente@test.com and cuidador@test.com (from previous testing). Contact request from Cliente Premium Demo to Cuidador Demo already accepted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 - MAJOR BUSINESS MODEL CHANGE tested successfully. Key features verified: 1) POST /api/contact-requests - only premium clients can send (free get 403). 2) GET /api/contact-requests/received & /sent - carers/clients can view. 3) PUT /api/contact-requests/{id}/accept|reject - creates connection on accept. 4) GET /api/connections/check/{user_id} - returns {connected: boolean}. 5) POST /api/chat/messages - ONLY works between connected users (403 for unconnected). 6) GET /api/care-requests - ONLY subscribed providers can view (403 for free carers and all clients). 7) GET /api/providers/{id} returns viewer_is_connected, viewer_has_subscription, viewer_has_pending_request flags. 8) Phone/WhatsApp only visible in provider profile when connected. 9) Frontend provider profile shows 4 states: connected (chat button + contact info), pending (waiting message), contact form (premium not connected), blocked (free/non-logged with subscription prompt). 10) Provider dashboard has 'Solicitudes Directas' tab with accept/reject buttons. 11) Client dashboard shows 'Solicitudes de Contacto Enviadas' section for premium clients.

contact_requests_api.POST /api/contact-requests: PASS - Only premium clients can send (free get 403)
contact_requests_api.GET /api/contact-requests/sent: PASS - Premium client can view sent requests
contact_requests_api.GET /api/contact-requests/received: PASS - Carer can view received requests

chat_permissions.GET /api/chat/conversations: PASS - Only shows conversations with connected users

care_requests_permissions.GET /api/care-requests: PASS - Only subscribed providers can view (403 for others)

provider_profile_flags.viewer_is_connected: PASS - Boolean flag in provider profile
provider_profile_flags.viewer_has_subscription: PASS - Boolean flag in provider profile
provider_profile_flags.viewer_has_pending_request: PASS - Boolean flag in provider profile
provider_profile_flags.contact_blocked: PASS - True when not connected, hides phone/whatsapp

frontend_provider_profile.connected_state: PASS - Shows 'Conectados' + chat button + full contact info
frontend_provider_profile.blocked_state: PASS - Shows lock icon + subscription prompt + price

frontend_provider_dashboard.contact_requests_tab: PASS - 'Solicitudes Directas' tab with accept/reject UI
frontend_provider_dashboard.accepted_requests: PASS - Shows 'Aceptada - Chat desbloqueado' with chat link

frontend_client_dashboard.sent_requests_section: PASS - 'Solicitudes de Contacto Enviadas' visible for premium
frontend_client_dashboard.request_status: PASS - Shows 'Chat Activo' for accepted requests

business_model_summary.free_clients: Can post care requests, receive offers, accept/reject → chat unlocks
business_model_summary.premium_clients: Can search carers, send direct contact requests → if accepted, chat unlocks
business_model_summary.free_carers: Only receive direct requests from premium clients (cannot see care requests)
business_model_summary.premium_carers: Can see published care requests and send offers
business_model_summary.chat_rule: ONLY works between connected users (after mutual acceptance)

known_issues.google_maps: RefererNotAllowedMapError - API key needs domain authorization (external config, not code bug)
